text.title: BA Knowledge Areas Overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying knowledge-areas-overview. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: L1 record routes to more than one KA.
antipattern.fix: Pick a single KA at L1; drilldown handles cross-KA at L2.

antipattern.symptom: Defaulting every ask to KA-2 elicitation.
antipattern.fix: Read the ask class before routing.

antipattern.symptom: L1 record contains L2 methodology detail.
antipattern.fix: L1 is one KA + one next methodology; further detail goes to knowledge-areas-detail.
